channel.title: AzRoleWatcher
channel.description: Continuously monitor roles and permissions in Microsoft Entra ID and Azure.

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: 5d0402fa-1042-4603-9e01-7fea218a05af
Display name: Connector Namespace Reader
Description: You have read-only access to all resources in a Connector Namespace and its sub-resources, including their configurations.
Link: https://management.azure.com/5d0402fa-1042-4603-9e01-7fea218a05af?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: 93ef01d8-7600-4956-9f82-b924cb66bfc6
Display name: Connector Namespace Developer
Description: You can create and manage connections, custom connectors, MCP server configurations, and trigger configurations within an existing Connector Namespace. You can't create, modify, or delete the Connector Namespace itself.
Link: https://management.azure.com/93ef01d8-7600-4956-9f82-b924cb66bfc6?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: bafa5965-3211-483c-a7b7-027648c789e9
Display name: Azure NetApp Files Reader
Description: Allows read-only discovery operations for Azure NetApp Files resources
Link: https://management.azure.com/bafa5965-3211-483c-a7b7-027648c789e9?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: c9ba051b-aad6-42fd-92dc-e48780abee75
Display name: Pure Storage Cloud VM Volume Group Owner
Description: To manage anything within the volume group resource.
Link: https://management.azure.com/c9ba051b-aad6-42fd-92dc-e48780abee75?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: e7560e73-ee25-4ed7-94f9-666cca24b501
Display name: Connector Namespace Contributor
Description: You can manage all aspects of a Connector Namespace and its sub-resources. You can't change access or ownership.
Link: https://management.azure.com/e7560e73-ee25-4ed7-94f9-666cca24b501?api-version=2022-04-01
